title: Malabar Gold & Diamonds is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Malabar Gold & Diamonds is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Malabar Gold & Diamonds in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds!
